pr.title: Record Submission: 1.1091 BPB - Turbo-Muon + EngramLite + ParamBanking + XSA (11L 512d)

output.summary: 11-layer GPT pairs Turbo-Muon, hash-based EngramLite, Parameter Banking, cross-sequence attention with U-Net skips, and GPTQ mixed-precision for 16MB.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Not a val-only setup; standard training plus validation.
techniques: Turbo-Muon optimizer with AOL preconditioning, Polar Express coefficients, and banked Newton-Schulz
EngramLite hash embeddings feeding U-Net-gated cross-sequence attention
GPTQ mixed-precision with Hessian-aware bit promotion, late QAT, and Brotli byte-shuffle compression
